summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM Dashboard and Staff Portal bug fixes. All reported issues have been verified as FIXED. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (16/16 tests). Frontend UI tests confirm leads persist after call action.

minor.issue: Returns 'pipeline_stages' array instead of 'pipeline' dict - inconsistent with other endpoints
Dashboard Pipeline Overview shows 0 for all stages except 'new' - known issue from iteration_54 (stage mismatch between frontend/backend)

critical_code_review_comments: The handleCallLead fix using window.open instead of window.location.href is working correctly
localStorage caching of leads data before calling is implemented and working
fetchAllData preserves existing data on errors - verified working
Mobile UI with larger touch targets is well implemented

test_credentials.staff_login: localStorage: asrStaffAuth=true, asrStaffData={staff_id: ASR1024, name: Test Staff Login, role: sales, id: 3fa43420-e9d3-4d41-a6dc-0fb3b5c6749b}

context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs have been fixed and verified. Staff portal leads section no longer goes white/blank after returning from call. Lead management in admin panel is working. Staff mobile-friendly access to leads and calls is working with large touch targets.

admin_crm_dashboard.pipeline_stats_display: PARTIAL - Shows 0 for most stages due to known stage mismatch issue
admin_crm_dashboard.lead_stage_update_dropdown: PASS - Stage dropdown visible and functional

staff_portal.leads_persist_after_call: PASS - No white screen, leads cached and restored
staff_portal.mobile_view_lead_cards: PASS - Cards with Call/WhatsApp buttons visible
staff_portal.lead_status_update_dropdown: PASS - Status changed from 'contacted' to 'site_visit' successfully

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Staff panel leads section goes white/blank after returning from call
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Tested call action simulation - leads persist after return, localStorage caching works

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Lead management in admin panel not working properly
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Leads table loads 69 leads, assignment dropdown works, stage update works

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Staff needs mobile-friendly access to leads and calls
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Mobile view shows large touch-friendly cards with Call Now and WhatsApp buttons

rca_of_issue: The white screen issue was caused by window.location.href being used for tel: links which caused full page navigation and state loss. The fix uses window.open with _self target and localStorage caching to preserve leads data.
